fields.name: repayment_schedule
fields.description: The repayment schedule for a loan

children.name: loan_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer

children.name: customer_name
children.description: The name of the customer

children.name: loan_type
children.description: Type of loan (e.g. Personal Loan)

children.name: principal_amount
children.description: The initial amount borrowed

children.name: interest_rate
children.description: The interest rate applied to the loan

children.name: loan_term_months
children.description: The number of months the loan is taken out for

children.name: start_date
children.description: The date the loan was started

children.name: maturity_date
children.description: The date the loan is due to mature

children.name: currency
children.description: The currency in which the loan is denominated

children.name: schedule_version
children.description: The version number of the repayment schedule

children.name: generated_date
children.description: When the repayment schedule was generated

children.name: repayment_frequency
children.description: The frequency at which repayments are made (e.g. Monthly)

children.name: total_repayments
children.description: The total number of repayments required

children.name: repayments
children.description: A list of individual repayment schedules

children.name: payment_number
children.description: The number of the payment

children.name: due_date
children.description: The date the payment is due

children.name: principal_payment
children.description: The amount of principal paid in this repayment

children.name: interest_payment
children.description: The amount of interest paid in this repayment

children.name: total_payment
children.description: The total amount paid in this repayment

children.name: outstanding_balance
children.description: The remaining balance after this repayment

children.name: status
children.description: The status of the payment (e.g. Pending)

children.name: summary
children.description: Summary information about the repayment schedule

children.name: total_amount_payable
children.description: The total amount payable over the life of the loan

children.name: total_interest
children.description: The total interest paid over the life of the loan

children.name: amount_paid_to_date
children.description: The amount paid to date

children.name: next_payment_due
children.description: The date the next payment is due

children.name: next_payment_amount
children.description: The amount of the next payment

children.name: metadata
children.description: Metadata about the repayment schedule

children.name: source_system
children.description: The system that originated the data

children.name: destination_system
children.description: The system that received the data

children.name: message_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the message

children.name: timestamp
children.description: When the message was generated
